message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with security and reliability enhancements

Key improvements across all workflow files:

ci.yml:
- Upgrade golangci-lint-action from v4 to v8 (current version)
- Upgrade codecov-action from v4 to v5
- Pin gosec to v2.22.1 instead of @master for security
- Add centralized GO_VERSION env variable for consistency
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs (5-15 min based on job complexity)
- Add explicit job-level permissions following least-privilege principle
- Use GitHub Actions annotations (::error::) for better error visibility
- Add pull-requests: write permission to dependency-review job

release.yml:
- Add centralized GO_VERSION env variable
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs (5-30 min based on complexity)
- Add explicit job-level permissions for docker, verify, announce jobs
- Upgrade docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6
- Enable provenance and sbom generation for Docker images
- Remove redundant comment on HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN

notify-acfs.yml:
- Consolidate duplicate acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml into this file
- Add release trigger for published releases
- Add root install.sh path monitoring
- Add proper token validation step with clear error messages
- Add explicit permissions block
- Add timeout-minutes
- Enrich dispatch payload with event type and repo info
- Remove emoji from log output for cleaner logs

Deleted:
- acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml (functionality merged into notify-acfs.yml)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -1,28 +1,45 @@
 # .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
 #
-# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change, triggering checksum updates.
-# Use this template for repos with install.sh in the scripts/ directory.
+# Notifies ACFS (Agentic Coding Flywheel Setup) when installer scripts change
+# or new releases are published, triggering checksum updates.
 #
 # Setup:
 #   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
 #   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
-#   3. Copy this file to .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
 #
-# Related: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-b04c
+# Related: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
 #
-name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
+name: Notify ACFS
 
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main, master]
     paths:
+      - 'install.sh'
       - 'scripts/install.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger for testing
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
 
 jobs:
-  notify-acfs:
+  notify:
+    name: Dispatch to ACFS
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
+      - name: Validate dispatch token
+        env:
+          TOKEN: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          if [ -z "$TOKEN" ]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN"
+            echo "Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
       - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
@@ -32,15 +49,18 @@ jobs:
           client-payload: |
             {
               "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
               "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
               "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
               "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
-              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || github.event.release.created_at }}"
             }
 
       - name: Log dispatch
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
-          echo "   Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
-          echo "   SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
-          echo "   Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
+          echo "  Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "  Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
